tasks.label: Start Postgres (docker compose)
tasks.detail: Starts the docker-compose postgresql service, waits for it to become healthy.

tasks.label: Flyway migrate
tasks.detail: Applies pending Flyway migrations (db/setup + db/migration) against the dev database.

tasks.label: Reset DB
tasks.detail: Drops the zfgbb schema and reapplies all migrations from V0 (setup) onward. After this completes, hit POST /system/install to populate admin + sample data.
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T postgresql psql -U zfgbb_user -d zfgc_dev -c 'drop schema if exists zfgbb cascade' && mvn -pl app -am flyway:migrate
